dailyNews.title: CAPF Bill says IPS necessary for Union-State coordination, reserves 50% I-G rank posts for IPS
dailyNews.description: The Bill seeks to negate a May 23, 2025 Supreme Court judgment which asked the Home Ministry to “progressively reduce” IPS deputation in CAPFs up to the rank of I-Gs in the next two years

dailyNews.title: Walker, Texas Ranger star and martial arts icon Chuck Norris dies at 86
dailyNews.description: A six-time karate champion and action film star, Norris was hospitalised in Hawaii on Thursday for unknown causes.

dailyNews.description: The US Education Department has transferred student loans to the Treasury Department, marking a significant step toward the Trump administration's dismantling of the agency. Here's what changes for the borrowers:

dailyNews.description: Iran’s supreme leader, president send conciliatory message to countries in the region as they mark the new year.

dailyNews.title: American Conference Commissioner Tim Pernetti thanks Trump for Army-Navy game executive order
dailyNews.description: American Athletic Conference Commissioner Tim Pernetti praised President Donald Trump for signing an executive order to protect the Army-Navy game's exclusive broadcast window.

dailyNews.title: Rep Boebert rejects call for another $200 billion to fund Iran war, while Americans 'can’t afford to live'
dailyNews.description: Rep. Boebert warned the policies being enacted by the Trump administration are not putting Americans first, warning the GOP needs to change course before the midterms.

dailyNews.title: Far-left ex-MSNBC host argues Kamala Harris shouldn't run in 2028, cites Biden policy 'stain'
dailyNews.description: Joy Reid argued Kamala Harris shouldn't run for president again during an interview on Friday, and said the U.S. would never elect a woman president in her lifetime.

dailyNews.title: Trump weighing several options for U.S. troops in Iran
dailyNews.description: Officials told NBC News that Trump is weighing several options for U.S. ground troops in Iran. There are several options under discussion, the sources said. One would be aimed at freeing up passage in the Strait of Hormuz by deploying troops to Iranian ports or small islands in the Persian Gulf to mitigate the threat to vessels, the sources said.

dailyNews.title: Father of service member killed in Iran war said he never told Pete Hegseth to 'finish' the job
dailyNews.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and President Donald Trump have said the families of service members who died in the Iran war told them to finish the job.

dailyNews.title: White House expands TrumpRx with three new drugs
dailyNews.description: The White House said Friday it’s adding three drugs for diabetes and lung disease to the self-pay platform TrumpRx, as the administration works to expand the site as part of its push to lower drug prices
